examples: FIFA says bin Hammam and Warner will now face a full FIFA inquiry.
In Hammam Sousse, twelve public Spaces have been delegated for campaign posters.
Some of this went into Goal, a programme set up by Mr Blatter that is now overseen by Mr Bin Hammam.
Turkish artists hand-painted the walls with intricate Ottoman designs and the bathrooms have hammam-style basins.
El Hammam was designated as a terrorist leader by the U.S. State Department two weeks ago.
